channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flypostering, 12th April
item.description:
Meeting House Lane. Remove flypostering from sign

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Meeting House Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Kings Grove junction of Meeting House Lane Keep Left sign faces in wrong direction . Please adjust

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): King's Grove, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Damaged bicycle parking hoop, 12th April
item.description:
As described previously
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very deep pothole on Slip road., 12th April
item.description:
The pothole has been there for some weeks now, and is very dangerous as it’s on fast moving road. And worse still it’s right at the top the slip road which is a hill, meaning you don’t see the pothole till you’ve hit it.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Byron Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees on council land behind Lidl Bexleyheath, 12th April
item.description:
Several very tall sycamore trees on a small strip of council land at least 80 feet tall between my garden and The Lidl store are becoming dangerously unstable. In the wind, lots of large branches have fallen and damage to my fence and shed roof has and is occurring . They also cause annoyance when they bang on the side of the Lidl building. They are around 20 feet taller than Lidl and can be seen at the front of the store. I live at 41 Tower Road, Bexleyheath, Kent, DA7 4JG

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Broadway, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street nameplate, 12th April
item.description:
Rocastle road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rocastle Road, Brockley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Piles of uncollected rubbish, 12th April
item.description:
Outside 62 Lynmouth Road. Piles of uncollected rubbish all over the pavement. Bins overflowing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lynmouth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Saw a household fly tpping, 12th April
item.description:
Was woken by a noise at midnight and saw someone walk down the Quay clearly with a black Hackney issued bin with 8 WQ on it to go to the flat's bins on the north side of the estate.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Watermint Quay, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 11th April
item.description:
This car has been parked next to our house for more than a month. From my cctv recording i can confirm the car was not moved at all.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Raeburn Road, Falconwood, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abondened vehicle, 11th April
item.description:
This vehicle has been parked next to hour house for more than a month and it has not moved at all.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Raeburn Road, Falconwood, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter dumped in woodland, 11th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kemnal Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
